description: It’s never too early to introduce a healthy oral care routine— start with Brush Buddies Blippi Toothbrushes! Each pack includes 6 soft bristle toothbrushes with a variety of colors and designs for a fun addition to your little one’s mornings and evenings. Each children’s toothbrush features a small, rounded brush head and textured ergonomic handle for easy grip. The bristles are gentle enough to effectively clean while protecting your child’s sensitive gums and enamel.

[Make Brushing Fun] With bright colors and unique Blippi learning activities, the children's toothbrushes are sure to make every morning a fun and exciting routine.
[Rotate Regularly] Although dentists recommend a new toothbrush every 90 days, it's important to swap your child's toothbrush after they get sick, too!

title: Spinbrush PRO CLEAN Battery Powered Toothbrush, Soft Bristles, 1 Count, Gold or Blue Color May Vary
description: Kiss your plaque goodbye with your NEW and improved Spinbrush PRO CLEAN Powered Toothbrush! The dual-action power toothbrush head is clinically proven to remove up to 70% more plaque in hard-to-reach places than a manual toothbrush. Soft-bristled electric brushes are ADA Accepted and proven to help reduce plaque and help prevent gingivitis. Color-Wear bristles fade over time to help remind you when it's time to replace the brush head. Keep your handle to save money and plastic with Spinbrush toothbrush brand refill packs! Handles are available in premium gold or metallic blue accent colors and may vary with purchase. Toothbrush includes two (2) replaceable AA Duracell batteries. This Spinbrush battery-powered extra soft brush cleansing toothbrush is Dentist Recommended, Not Tested on Animals, and Made Without BPA Plastics. The new, easy-to-open carton is recyclable and the tray inside (plastic #1) is made with recycled materials. Spin your way to a spotless smile with this great cleaning toothbrush! Along with this adult toothbrush, kid options and additional dental hygiene items are available.
features: REMOVE MORE PLAQUE with Spinbrush PRO CLEAN brush heads; up to 70% more than a manual toothbrush in hard-to-reach places
DUAL ACTION BRUSH HEAD features oscillating circle (spinner) and sliding plate (scrubber), moving up to 3,900 sweeps per minute
SOFT SWITCH power buttons are easier to turn on/off and help prevent water from leaking inside the brush
ADA ACCEPTED toothbrush with soft bristles clinically proven to help remove plaque and help reduce gingivitis

features: Photocatalyst Whitening - Our special formula is a light activated foaming toothpaste that rapidly whitens teeth when paired with GO SMILE BLU blue light toothbrushes. Experience the powerful cleaning of the foaming micro scrubbers while achieving maximum whitening results and stain removal simultaneously.

Advanced Teeth Whitening Formula - Our foaming toothpaste effectively cleans and break up plaque that accrues on teeth, especially after dark liquids like coffee, tea, or red wines. The bubbles penetrate those hard-to-reach places regular toothpaste can't get to.

A Powerful Toothpaste For Professional Results - Remove tough stains and prevent new stains from setting with our specially formula that penetrates teeth for deep whitening and not just surface stains.

Gentle Whitening - Our GO SMILE foaming toothpaste is safe to use on crowns, veneers, and other dental materials. Our toothpaste has been proven to whiten up to 10x better than the leading whitening toothpaste.

Created by a dentist, GO SMILE has been whitening smiles for nearly 20 years. Based in the San Francisco Bay Area, we have revolutionized at-home and on-the-go teeth whitening products that are safe, effective and clinically proven to whiten with no sensitivity. Our products are known for their innovation, ease of use and award-winning results.

reviews.title: No good
reviews.text:
I ordered this for my son, and he loved it so much! He had fun brushing his teeth and did such a good job.
For like 2 weeks.
The battery is not waterproofed, so it is all getting wet every time you brush and rinse. So now it doesn't work. I thought it was just a dead battery, but nope. It all got wet and is ruined.
I'm super disappointed. You would think something like a toothbrush would be better sealed to prevent such a thing from happening. And of course, it died right after the return deadline.
Save yourself the money and drama of explaining to a toddler why he can't use his Blippi brush anymore.

reviews.title: good value
reviews.text: for my grandson he loved them

reviews.title: Works as needed.
reviews.text: You get what you pay for. These kids toothbrushes aren’t expensive and what you receive is good value for the money. Yes, some of the toothbrushes get loosened fibers over time, but we don’t keep them long enough to reach that point. The more aggressive of a brusher you are, the quicker you need to replace them. I find that they don’t last 3 months with good consistent brushing, as the quality declines with usage. Overall I’m happy with these for my son, just remember to switch them out within three months. The design is a great bonus for kids that enjoy HotWheels!

reviews.title: Good, but take a bit to soften
reviews.text: The first time I used these they made my gums bleed. It takes a bit for the bristles to soften up. The bristles also tend to look a bit frayed after a few weeks which definitely doesn’t happen with the name brand ones.

reviews.title: Every bit as good as the ones made by Oral-B
reviews.text:
I've been using Oral-B electric toothbrushes for 15-20 years and have always purchased replacement brushes made by them. This time I decided to see if I could save some money and give these a try, and I'm very glad that I did.

The only difference I can see between the Schallcare ones and the ones sold under the Oral-B Sensitive Care label is that these fit tighter, which results in a surprisingly large reduction in the noise level, and of course they only cost 1/3 as much. I've been using one the Schallcare brushes for about 6 weeks now and it shows absolutely no wear, so I think there's a good chance they will last every bit as long as the Oral-B brand ones.

reviews.title: Great size...
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are the perfect size for toddlers.  The bristles are soft and the handle is made of a combination of hard plastic and silicone, so it’s easy to grip.  The optional silicone guard is perfect for helping little ones learn how to control the brush.  And, each brush has a suction cup on the end of the handle, so it’s easy to stand them up in the bathroom counter.  My only issue is that one of the brushes got smashed during delivery and the silicone guard is bent inwards...it will probably pop out in time, so really only a minor issue.  Overall, nice infant to toddler toothbrushes!

reviews.title: One of my favorite toddler toothbrushes
reviews.text: I really love how theses have the guards. My nephew has special needs so while he's 8, he physically is like an infant. We are teaching him how to hold a toothbrush and brush his own teeth. This is great because he always puts too much in his mouth and ends up choking. If you have a new leader to brushing teeth this is most definitely will be your saving grace.

reviews.title: A bit too soft
reviews.text:
I ordered this to replace the disposable Colgate electric toothbrush I use for travel. The Colgate does not have replaceable batteries and is a bit large for my kit, but prevents me from carrying my Sonicare. I was hopeful this would be a good replacement.

It's not quite there. The size is okay, but the bristles are very soft and the motion is very gentle. You won't hurt yourself with it, but it has nothing on the cheap Colgate or expensive Sonicare. The other problem is that the cap doesn't post onto the base. That wouldn't have been hard for them to do.

It is a gentle electric toothbrush, just too gentle for my needs.

reviews.title: I only use this for spending one night in a ...
reviews.text: I only use this for spending one night in a hotel, it works OK for that but don't expect it to be as vigorous as the much larger Phillips Sonicare.

title: Oral-B iO Series 4 Electric Toothbrush with (1) Brush Head, Rechargeable, Black
description: The iO is Oral-B’s best technology: Clinically Proven 500% More Plaque Removal Along Gumline versus a manual toothbrush. The i04 coaches you to a perfect clean. This is real time personalized coaching. The accompanying App shows your daily brushing report. Having 4 Brush Modes (Daily Clean, Whiten, Sensitive, and Super Sensitive) Oral-B is on your team for your everyday brushing task. A Round head and gentle micro-vibrations, the Magnetic interaction delivers smooth, harmonious motion through a Synchronized cleaning action (micro-vibrations synced with oscillations). A Built-in-2-Minute Timer ensures an even easier experience, helping you get an optimal clean on all your teeth. The Oral-B's quadrant timer breaks the two minutes up into four 30-second intervals to clean each quadrant of your mouth; we keep the time, so you don’t have to. Delivering the perfect pressure is done by having a Pressure Sensor. The Pressure Sensor Indicates optimal cleaning pressure and warns of over pressure. With an accompanying travel case, you’ll have a fresh clean everywhere you go. We’re with you on your next trip or even your mid-day on-the go brushing! Best of all, it is brought to you by Oral-B—the #1 brand used by dentists worldwide.* *Based on surveys of a representative worldwide sample of dentists carried out for P&G regularly.Do not use on children under age 3. Replace brush (head) every 3 months or sooner if brush head becomes worn.
features: You will receive (1) Oral-B iO4 Electric Toothbrush, (1) Ultimate Clean Replacement Brush Head, and (1) Travel Case, and (1) charger
Clinically proven to remove 500% more plaque along the gumline vs. a regular manual toothbrush
4 Smart Modes for personalized brushing: Daily Clean, Whiten, Sensitive, and Super Sensitive
Includes a 2 minute timer to ensure a complete clean
Pressure sensor indicates optimal cleaning pressure and warns of over pressure
Round head and gentle micro-vibrations
Oral-B: Trust the brush dentists use the most worldwide

reviews.title: Very good for the price, specialty brush heads are a little expensive.
reviews.text: This brush works very well for gum health in particular. The pressure function is a nice addition as well. The only downside is that it does not take the traditional Oral-b brush head, it only uses the IO style head which is significantly more expensive.

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.text: I like them. They aren't soft, which I like, but they also aren't hard. The tongue cleaner is useless, so you should buy a tongue cleaner.

reviews.title: Great toothbrushes!
reviews.text: I buy these in a multipack because I'm bad at replacing my toothbrushes if I have to buy them every time. Great toothbrushes. Bristles are medium firm and the circular silicon parts are very good for giving you a clean feeling. The back of head of the toothbrush is textured to use against your tongue, even though I usually don't use it that way.

reviews.title: Great Product at a Great Price
reviews.text: I have always felt that this is the greatest toothbrush ever made, and they have unfortunately become very difficult to find at my local stores.  I have never seen these value packs at any store.  This is the only way to go.  These brushes have wide, soft heads.  The handle is very ergonomically designed and fits very nicely in your hand.  Just buy them.  You won't regret it.

reviews.title: Bad design.
reviews.text:
The tongue clean is extremely irritating when you brush your teeth. Tried to peel it off and couldn't. Threw it away.
Tongue cleaning should be done with another device.

Toothbrush improves oral health in 2 weeks by reducing gingivitis in a short term clinical trial Two Flexing Sides! One Superior Clean vs. a regular manual brush Gentle on gums. Individual flexing sides Oral-B Pro-Health Advanced Toothbrush has flexing sides that adjust to the unique curves and contours of your teeth, including gum line, for a superior clean vs. an ordinary manual brush Because of its flexibility, it is gentle on gums too. reviews.title: I like the feel of this toothbrush- BUT....
reviews.text:
Within maybe a week to 10 days, it already looks worn out and may not be cleaning as well. I may try a 2nd brush but if it's not any better, these are going back to the big box store that starts with a C that I bought them at.

Not sure if the medium would be better or not. I may call Oral B and/or I may try another brand and/or return them.

title: BEBEN Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults, IPX7 Toothbrush Electric with Long Battery Toothbrush Life for 60 Days, Rechargeable Electronic Toothbrush Set with 5 Tooth Brush Heads-White
features: High Frequency For Deeper Cleaning---From 31,000 to 43,000 sonic vibrations per minute, effectively remove plaque and reduce gums bleeding. Deep cleaning between teeth. The cleaning effect is far more remarkable than manual toothbrush

5 Cleaning Modes and Smart Memory Function---5 high performance brushing modes for different tooth and gum conditions: Clean, White, Fresh, Soft and Strong. Equipped with intelligent memory function. When you use it again, it will automatically select the mode you used last time

Efficient Type C Charging and 60 days Battery Life---Charged once, works for 60 days. The powerful and durable battery life means you don't have to charge it frequently. Advanced USB C charging port is compatible with most USB power adapter, make your travel more convenient

2 Minutes Timer for Scientific Brushing Habit---Follow scientific dental advice with built in 2 minutes smart timer. The toothbrush pauses every 30 seconds to remind you to move, precisely control your brushing time

IPX7 Waterproof with 5 Replacing Brush---IPX7 waterproof level, no fear of washing with water. Handy to use and easy to clean. 5 spare brush heads are included in the package, no need to pay extra for replacement brush heads

title: Milos Electric Toothbrush Replacement Heads for Kids, Oral B Compatible Pack of 16, Extra Soft Bristles, Fits for Electric Braun Brush Heads, Refill for Vitality Precision Sensitive and Clean Triumph
features: Compatible - Our toothbrush head set is versatile and compatible with most Braun and Oral B toothbrushes (excluding Oral B Pulsonic and iO).
Professional - Show those pearly whites with confidence! The flexible DuPont bristles on our toothbrush replacement brush heads are designed to remove plaque and promote healthy gums.
Convenient - Each brush on our kid toothbrush head replacement set has a color-coded ring at the bottom to make differentiation easy for the whole family.
Fading Bristles - Take the guesswork out of your hygiene routine. The colored bristles on these toothbrush refills fade to let you know when it's time for a replacement.
Pack Includes - This electric toothbrush head set comes with 16 replacements to make sure you stay on top of your oral health.

reviews.title: I just got it so I can't comment on durability, but...
reviews.text: This is much less expensive than Oral B brush heads. I contacted Oral B to tell them I thought their brush heads are exorbitantly priced, but they blamed it on supply chain issues. So apparently Milos is somehow not affected by supply chain issues. It kinda makes it seem like Oral B's response was B.S. Anyway, these heads I bought fit my Oral B ProHealth toothbrush. It's kind of weird that the bristles aren't all flush with one another, but they seem to work fine. I don't care that the colors don't match with the toothbrush body.

reviews.title: Cheap off brand
reviews.text: You will go through these fast as they seem to wear down super quick. They came fast and were cheap I need them quick as we ran out but I won't order them again.

reviews.title: Best basic toothbrush, hands down.
reviews.text: It's a shame they stopped selling these in America. The smaller head size is perfect for getting the hard-to-reach back of the molars, and the super soft bristles are great if you have any issues with gun recession. Here's hoping Sensodyne recognizes that Americans would buy these again if they sold them here.

reviews.title: My Favorite Toothbrush
reviews.text: Small head and soft bristles.  Cleans everything thoroughly!

title: Dr. Collins Perio Toothbrush With Supersoft Bristles, Pink/White
description: The Dr. Collins Perio Toothbrush is unlike any other toothbrush on the market. With its innovative, patented tapering technique, the Perio Toothbrush features super slim polyester bristles that penetrate further between the teeth to remove plaque and debris. The Perio Toothbrush bristles are also ultra soft, reducing the likelihood of abrasion and recession while simultaneously allowing gentle gum stimulation. The polyester bristles of the Perio Toothbrush are less porous, creating a more hygienic brushing experience. The bristle also lasts approximately 50% longer than a standard nylon toothbrush. The Perio Toothbrush is great for all ages, including those undergoing orthodontic treatment, suffering from sensitivity or gum recession.
features: PME Edible Luster Spray 100ml. Use this Luster Spray on your Sugar Art projects!

reviews.title: Very soft, feels effective too
reviews.text: This is the softest toothbrush i have ever used.  I grew up believing that the harder the brush, the better for your teeth.  Now that i have almost no enamel left on my teeth i'm beginning to believe that softer might have been better all along.  These are super soft and almost fun to brush with.  I also bought the new Crest "chocolate" toothpaste!  If you're looking for a gentle and soft toothbrush, this is the one!

reviews.title: Excellent ultra soft  toothbrush
reviews.text: Dr Collins makes the best ultra soft toothbrush for excellent dental hygiene.... makes a big difference.... great purchase!!

reviews.title: Have used these for years and I really like them.
reviews.text: These perio toothbrushes are very comfortable and effective. I have used them for years. I like them better than the type brushes my dentist gives me with my 6 month cleaning visits.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text: Really like this toothbrush.

reviews.title: Excellent!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is the best brush out there imo. First of all, this brush only comes in a compact size, which is the size most people should be using (versus full). Second, the bristles are very soft and gentle and are all the same length... there is no scratchy feel like with some other brushes that have various length bristles to reach further under the gumline. These bristles are very gentle on gums yet clean them well. The best thing is that the brush really cleans the teeth. In my experience this toothbrush cleans better that the oral b line, better than mentadent pro care, better than reach, and better than the butler gum summit which has similar tapered bristles. This is a very good toothbrush that gets the job done gently but very effectively.

reviews.title: I am one of those people that can't stand the ...
reviews.text: I am one of those people that can't stand the feel of soft bristled toothbrushes.  I am therefore stuck looking all over to find one of the medium bristled ones.  I have finally found one that feels right and leaves my teeth feeling clean without making my gums bleed.

reviews.title: Clean away
reviews.text: brushes my teeth every day. deserves 5*

reviews.title: Good delivery but poore choice by the packager
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. I often use this brand and style it holds up very well, however I did not like the fact that they sent a guy a pink toothbrush.

reviews.title: Very good travel toothbrush when your sonic is at home.
reviews.text: or when the rest of the family is asleep and you don't want the noisy electric brush to wake them up. The thick handle and light weight is ideal for the elderly or those with arthritis making a tight grip harder to do. I like the medium brush better than the soft bristle, with the medium you don't have to brush as hard for clean teeth and as long as you aren't grinding the bristles into your mouth your gums should not become stressed. With the soft bristle, while ideal for gums, my teeth don't feel as clean.

reviews.title: Polishing star takes some getting used to
reviews.text:
I'm not sure the polishing star is really more effective than normal bristles if you do a good job of brushinganyway, and it is a but squeaky on my teeth and can rub the gums the wrong way if you are careless in brushing.

That said, the medium bristles are effective and not too hard, and I did like the head size, handle grip and overall effectiveness.
